title: Martin Giepmans
text: Home * People * Martin Giepmans Martin Giepmans [1] Martin Giepmans , was a Dutch computer chess programmer, and author of the chess engines SpiderChess and Anatoli , both written in Delphi . Martin died from cancer in October 2009 [2] [3] .
